title: FalCloud tier env-key resolution via X:/env_sync

before.blocker: G9 — fal.ai key-resolution route TBD; key NOT in env_sync; not pursuable autonomously

after.shim_blocker: fal.ai animation-agent wrapper script not yet built; ANIM-17 closes the key-resolution gate only — shim implementation is a follow-on phase

new_helpers: effective_tier_status(tier_name, cfg) -> dict (runtime status incorporating env-key probe)
muscle_video_agent.py.anim17_security_note: agent never emits the raw key bytes. Only fingerprint (first4:last4) + sha256[:12] + key_length are exposed in probe/plan output. resolver strips key from any result dict before record.

plan_tier_falcloud.shim_blocker: fal.ai animation-agent wrapper script not yet built; ANIM-17 closes the key-resolution gate only — shim implementation is a follow-on phase

regression_plan_tier_wan22.note: non-env-keyed tiers unchanged; key_resolution=null in output

negative_path_summary.ENV_SYNC_PATH_MISSING: fires when env_sync file does not exist
negative_path_summary.ENV_SYNC_UNPARSEABLE: fires on non-JSON content OR top-level non-object JSON (array/string/etc.)
negative_path_summary.ENV_KEY_MISSING: fires when env_sync file is a valid object but the named field is absent
negative_path_summary.ENV_KEY_NOT_STRING: fires when the field exists but is not a string (e.g. integer)
negative_path_summary.ENV_KEY_EMPTY: fires when the field is present but the empty string
negative_path_summary.effective_tier_status_pending_shim: FalCloud cfg with shim_status=PENDING returns KEY_OK_SHIM_PENDING with fingerprint exposed and no raw key bytes
negative_path_summary.effective_tier_status_shim_ready: FalCloud cfg with shim_status=READY returns READY (for the future post-shim state)

leak_check.verification: evidence file scanned for full key prefix ('95de69b8-50d2-45f6-85fd-615573ec9900') and full key suffix ('ea42a27df4643b6cfc394ce541cc0714'); neither present
leak_check.method: string search at evidence-mint time; failure aborts the harness

security_review.secret_handling: raw key bytes live in process memory only during resolve_env_key_from_env_sync() return → effective_tier_status() consumption. resolver returns include 'key' for inline use; all downstream consumers (plan_tier, --probe-key CLI, --list-tiers annotation) strip 'key' before json.dumps emission. Negative-paths probe verifies this stripping discipline.
non_exposed: any substring of the key longer than 4 chars at either end
security_review.env_sync_location_acceptability: X:/env_sync/user_portable.json is already NAS-backed per existing feedback_settings_secrets_hygiene memory; ANIM-17 references the path but does not widen the leakage surface; key never copied to repo or non-X locations.

open_followons: ANIM-18 (or later): build the fal.ai animation-agent shim — wraps the resolved key + shot-list + storyboard payload and submits to fal.ai. On shim completion, ANIM-05 tier_config.FalCloud.shim_status flips PENDING -> READY, and effective_tier_status() resolves FalCloud to READY → --plan-tier FalCloud returns PLAN.
